request: Fix two shipped runtime leaks that break consumer installs (.claude/skills/triage/seed-tasklist.mjs imports + .claude/skills/harness/SKILL.md inline node -e referencing src/cli/). Vendor the consumed modules into shipped skill directories, with scripts/build-template.sh copying them from src/cli/ at build time. Harden spec-shippability-review/scan-shipped-skills.mjs to walk shipped helper files for src|tests|scripts|obj refs and to inspect inline backticks inside *.md, so this class can't recur. Update prose in triage/SKILL.md, harness/SKILL.md, and commands/init-project-doctor.md.
